mapper.select:
SELECT pay_method AS groupKey, COUNT(*) AS transactionCount, SUM(total_amount) AS totalAmount, SUM(discount_amount) AS discountAmount, SUM(overdue_amount) AS overdueAmount, SUM(pre_pay_amount) AS prePayAmount, SUM(pay_amount) AS payAmount FROM resi_pay_log WHERE pay_type = 'COLLECT'
AND project_id = #{projectId}
AND creator_time >= CONCAT(#{beginDate}, ' 00:00:00')
AND creator_time <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
AND project_id IN
#{pid}
GROUP BY pay_method ORDER BY SUM(pay_amount) DESC
